'''竏營h-zh-ng''' ('''kazhazhang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ebb|ebb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ebb|ebb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營h-zh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kazhazhang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhazhang|thizhazhang]] || [[word:jizhazhang|jizhazhang]] || [[word:shizhazhang|shizhazhang]] || [[word:kizhazhang|kizhazhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhazhang|thuthuzhazhang]] || [[word:jujuzhazhang|jujuzhazhang]] || [[word:shushuzhazhang|shushuzhazhang]] || [[word:kukuzhazhang|kukuzhazhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhazhang|thuzhazhang]] || [[word:juzhazhang|juzhazhang]] || [[word:shuzhazhang|shuzhazhang]] || [[word:kuzhazhang|kuzhazhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhazhang|thuzhazhang]] || [[word:juzhazhang|juzhazhang]] || [[word:shuzhazhang|shuzhazhang]] || [[word:kuzhazhang|kuzhazhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhazhang|thezhazhang]] || [[word:jezhazhang|jezhazhang]] || [[word:shezhazhang|shezhazhang]] || [[word:kezhazhang|kezhazhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhazhang|thothozhazhang]] || [[word:jojozhazhang|jojozhazhang]] || [[word:shoshozhazhang|shoshozhazhang]] || [[word:kokozhazhang|kokozhazhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhazhang|thozhazhang]] || [[word:jozhazhang|jozhazhang]] || [[word:shozhazhang|shozhazhang]] || [[word:kozhazhang|kozhazhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhazhang|thozhazhang]] || [[word:jozhazhang|jozhazhang]] || [[word:shozhazhang|shozhazhang]] || [[word:kozhazhang|kozhazhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzhazhang|thﾃｦzhazhang]] || [[word:jﾃｦzhazhang|jﾃｦzhazhang]] || [[word:shﾃｦzhazhang|shﾃｦzhazhang]] || [[word:kﾃｦzhazhang|kﾃｦzhazhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhazhang|thathazhazhang]] || [[word:jajazhazhang|jajazhazhang]] || [[word:shashazhazhang|shashazhazhang]] || [[word:kakazhazhang|kakazhazhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhazhang|thazhazhang]] || [[word:jazhazhang|jazhazhang]] || [[word:shazhazhang|shazhazhang]] || [[word:kazhazhang|kazhazhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhazhang|thazhazhang]] || [[word:jazhazhang|jazhazhang]] || [[word:shazhazhang|shazhazhang]] || [[word:kazhazhang|kazhazhang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhazhang|shazhazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhazhang|goshazhazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhazhang|gokishazhazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhangnﾃｼ|shazhazhangnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnknﾃｼ|goshazhazhangnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangnﾃｼ|gokishazhazhangnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhazhangshﾃｫ|shazhazhangshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkshﾃｫ|goshazhazhangnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangshﾃｫ|gokishazhazhangshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhangro|shazhazhangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkro|goshazhazhangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangro|gokishazhazhangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhangmu|shazhazhangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkmu|goshazhazhangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangmu|gokishazhazhangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhazhangsher|shazhazhangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnksher|goshazhazhangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangsher|gokishazhazhangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhazhang|shazhazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkng|goshazhazhangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhazhang|gokishazhazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhazhangya|shazhazhangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkya|goshazhazhangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangya|gokishazhazhangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhazhangyam|shazhazhangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkyam|goshazhazhangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangyam|gokishazhazhangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazhangnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shazhazhangnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshazhazhangnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishazhazhangnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhangnﾃｼro|shazhazhangnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnknﾃｼro|goshazhazhangnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangnﾃｼro|gokishazhazhangnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhangnﾃｼmu|shazhazhangnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnknﾃｼmu|goshazhazhangnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangnﾃｼmu|gokishazhazhangnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhangshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shazhazhangshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshazhazhangnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishazhazhangshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhangshﾃｫro|shazhazhangshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkshﾃｫro|goshazhazhangnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangshﾃｫro|gokishazhazhangshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhangshﾃｫmu|shazhazhangshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkshﾃｫmu|goshazhazhangnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangshﾃｫmu|gokishazhazhangshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhangronﾃｼ|shazhazhangronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkronﾃｼ|goshazhazhangnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangronﾃｼ|gokishazhazhangronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazhangroshﾃｫ|shazhazhangroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkroshﾃｫ|goshazhazhangnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangroshﾃｫ|gokishazhazhangroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhangromu|shazhazhangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkromu|goshazhazhangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangromu|gokishazhazhangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhangmunﾃｼ|shazhazhangmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkmunﾃｼ|goshazhazhangnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangmunﾃｼ|gokishazhazhangmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazhangmushﾃｫ|shazhazhangmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkmushﾃｫ|goshazhazhangnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangmushﾃｫ|gokishazhazhangmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhangmuro|shazhazhangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhangnkmuro|goshazhazhangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhangmuro|gokishazhazhangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
